content:
Input: prefetch instance pool \(P\) , decoding instance pool \(D\) , request \(R\) , cache block size \(B\)   
Output: the prefetch and decoding instances \((p,d)\) to process \(R\)   
1: block_keys \(\leftarrow\) PrefixHash(Rprompt_tokens,B)   
2: TTFT \(\leftarrow\) inf   
3: \(p\gets \emptyset\)   
4: best_prefix_len, best_MATCHed_instance \(\leftarrow\) FindBestPrefixMatch(P, block_keys)   
5: for instance \(\in P\) do   
6: prefix_len \(\leftarrow\) instance-prefix_len   
7: \(T_{\mathrm{queue}}\gets\) EstimatePrefillQueueTime.instance)   
8: if best_prefix_len < kvcacheBALANCING_threshold then Cache-aware prefetch scheduling   
9: \(T_{\mathrm{prefill}}\gets\) EstimatePrefillExecutionTime(len(R_prompt_tokens),prefix_len)   
10: if TTFT > T_queue + Tprefill then   
11: TTFT \(\leftarrow\) T_queue + Tprefill   
12: \(p\gets\) instance   
13: end if   
14: else Cache-aware and -balancing prefetch scheduling   
15: transfer_len \(\leftarrow\) best_prefix_len - prefix_len   
16: \(T_{\mathrm{transfer}}\gets\) EstimateKVCacheTransferTime.instance, best_MATCHed_instance, transfer_len)   
17: \(T_{\mathrm{prefill}}\gets\) EstimatePrefillExecutionTime(len(R_prompt_tokens),best_prefix_len)   
18: if TTFT > T_transfer + T_queue + Tprefill then   
19: TTFT \(\leftarrow\) T_transfer + T_queue + Tprefill   
20: \(p\gets\) instance   
21: end if   
22: end if   
23: end for   
24: d, TBT \(\leftarrow\) SelectDecodingInstance(D) Load-balancing decoding scheduling   
25: if TTFT > TTFT_SLO or TBT > TBT_SLO then   
26: reject R; return   
27: end if   
28: if best_prefix_len > kvcacheBALANCING_threshold then   
29: TransferKVCache(best_MATCHed_instance,p) KVCache hot-spot migration   
30: end if   
31: return (p,d)

DatasetAvg Input LengthAvg Output LengthCache RatioArrival Pattern
ArXiv Summarization [26]8088229~0%Poisson Process
L-Eval [27]1901972>80%Poisson Process
Simulated Data16k, 32k, 64k, 128k51250%Poisson Process
Real Data7955194~50%Timestamp-based

BaselineEarly RejectionEarly Rejection based on Prediction
Number of rejected requests418337713589
